name: Hugging Face
description: Connect to Hugging Face Hub and thousands of Gradio AI Applications
longDescription: Official Hugging Face MCP Server connecting AI assistants to the Hugging Face Hub. Search and explore models, datasets, Spaces, and papers. Run community tools via MCP-compatible Gradio apps hosted on Spaces.
author: co.huggingface

Show me trending Spaces on Hugging Face
Search for recent papers about LLM fine-tuning
Get details about the GPT-2 model
